vocab.example: I find that my cognitive function is at its zenith shortly after breakfast, making it the ideal time for deep study.
There is a specific optimal window in the late afternoon when I feel a second wind of energy and focus.

vocab.meaning: kiểu thời gian sinh học (nhóm người thuộc cú đêm hay sơn ca)
vocab.example: Understanding my chronotype has helped me realize that I am far more productive in the quietude of the morning.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung bị giảm sút
vocab.example: By 3 PM, I often suffer from diminished concentration, so I avoid tackling complex subjects during that period.

vocab.meaning: sự mệt mỏi về tinh thần
vocab.example: I prefer morning sessions to forestall the mental fatigue that inevitably sets in after a long day of lectures.

vocab.meaning: tỉnh táo, cảnh giác (trạng thái đầu óc nhạy bén)
vocab.example: I feel most vigilant and alert before noon, whereas the afternoon sun tends to make me feel rather drowsy.
My capacity to absorb information is significantly higher when the house is still and the world is just waking up.
I usually schedule my mock exams for the morning to capitalize on my period of peak alertness.

vocab.meaning: thụ động, ít vận động (trạng thái khi ngồi học quá lâu)
vocab.example: After a sedentary morning of reading, I find the afternoon more suitable for interactive or group study sessions.

vocab.meaning: khai thác, tận dụng (năng lượng, thời gian)
vocab.example: I try to harness the natural stillness of the early hours to get through my most daunting assignments.
